description: ablation D (D-failure timing) — Opus 4.6: reasoning=adaptive, reflection=none, scenario=mid-2strike (D reliable 1-3, fails 4-5, reliable 6-11). Matched-count timing comparator to the early 2-strike cell — same number of D-failures (2), different timing (mid-game after trust establishes, vs early before trust). 3-game pre-failure window for trust to establish, 6-game post-failure window for measuring scarring effects. Isolates the TIMING effect from the COUNT effect. Direct comparator: ablation_d_schedule_opus_adaptive_norefl_2strike (early 2-strike, same count).

reasoning_effort_config._comment: Adaptive mode. Only difference from main_claude_opus_recovery: 2 failures concentrated mid-game (games 4-5) instead of game 1.

D._comment: Mid-2strike: D reliable games 1-3 (trust establishes), fails games 4-5 (mid-game break), reliable games 6-11 (6-game post-failure measurement window).
